name: 蛇蠍反派（爭寵型）
description: Lady Lily作為反派，用巫蠱之術控制皇帝、陷害女主，是經典的後宮爭寵反派。她的存在為女主提供了展示智慧和勇氣的舞台。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: Lily, even if you kill this worm, what good will that do? Guards, hold Lily down... Lily, you have a lot of nerve. How dare you poison the emperor with a worm?
examples.context: Lady Lily作為反派，用巫蠱之術控制皇帝、陷害女主，是經典的後宮爭寵反派。她的存在為女主提供了展示智慧和勇氣的舞台。
